item.description: About me I’m a data scientist based in Hong Kong. My work is mainly on prediction and analytics in construction. Having experiences in various frameworks, my current main tools are Python and C#. Feel free to contact me if there are available opportunities.

Projects My side projects. Axomark Anonymous bookmarks with password protection. axomark.xyz C# MSSQL Wrapper SQL Server Query builder for C#. GitHub Link Distributed estimation via paid crowd work Accepted ICASSP 2016 research paper on collective intelligence. IEEE Link PTAM on Android Porting the PTAM Augmented Reality algorithm to Android 4.x as my final year project in university. Demo Video 1 | Demo Video 2
